name: Disney Inspire Visa Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $300 Disney Gift Card upon approval and a $300 statement credit after spending $1,000 on purchases within the first three months from account opening. Total welcome value up to $600.

earning_rates.notes: Earned as Disney Rewards Dollars; includes Disney World, Disneyland, Disney Cruise Line, Aulani

annual_credits.name: Disney Streaming Credit
annual_credits.description: $10 monthly statement credit for spending $10 or more on qualifying subscriptions or add-on purchases made directly at DisneyPlus.com, Hulu.com or ESPN+ (requires yearly activation). Up to $120 per year.

annual_credits.name: Disney Theme Park Tickets Credit
annual_credits.description: $100 statement credit after spending $200 per anniversary year on Disney Theme Park Ticket purchases in the U.S.

annual_credits.name: Disney Resorts and Cruise Bonus
annual_credits.description: Earn 200 Disney Rewards Dollars after spending $2,000 per anniversary year on Disney Resorts in the U.S. and Disney Cruise Line bookings

other_benefits: No interest on eligible Disney vacation packages for 6 months
Character photo opportunities at Disneyland and Disney World
10% off select merchandise at Disney World and Disneyland
10% off select dining at Disney World and Disneyland
15% off select guided tours at Disney World and Disneyland
10% off select recreation experiences at Disney World and Disneyland
Special savings on Disney Cruise Line (digital photo packages, merchandise, island experience packages, onboard spa)
Savings at Aulani Resort (merchandise, snorkeling, activities)
VIP Broadway package for Aladdin or Lion King (premium seating, beverage, commemorative print)

sources.notes: The Points Guy detailed review: $149 annual fee, $600 welcome bonus ($300 gift card + $300 statement credit), earning rates, and annual benefits
Chase official Disney Inspire page with earning rates, $100 park tickets credit, $10 monthly streaming credit, and 200 Disney Rewards Dollars annual bonus
CNBC on Disney Inspire launch: $600 welcome offer, $149 annual fee, $420 in annual perks

notes: New premium Disney card launched February 2026 by Chase and Disney. Replaces/disrupts the previous Disney Premier Visa ($49 annual fee). The $600 welcome bonus ($300 Disney gift card upon approval + $300 statement credit after $1,000 spend) is the strongest Disney card bonus ever. The $149 annual fee is higher than the Disney Premier ($49) and Disney Visa ($0), but annual credits ($120 streaming + $100 park tickets = $220) largely offset it for frequent Disney travelers. The 3% at Disney locations and gas stations and 2% at grocery stores and restaurants provides solid everyday earning for Disney fans. Disney Rewards Dollars redeem 1:$1 on park tickets, resort stays, Disney store, movies at AMC, Disney Cruise Line, and airline purchases via Pay Yourself Back. Best for frequent Disney visitors who will maximize the annual credits.
